text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm searching the school for Tazuna, thinking it
might be nice to invite her out, when suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Are you listening?! We must handle this posthaste!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Personal space! Our faces are almost touching,
Tazuna!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear an uncharacteristically angry—yet
familiar—voice from around the corner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I hurry over to see what's going on.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Pardon my manners, but this is a serious situation,
Director Akikawa!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The Tracen Academy infirmary is an important
lifeline for our Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But it can't fulfill that role if it isn't fully
equipped. Running out of essential equipment is
unacceptable!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Indeed! I wholeheartedly agree with you.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
However, the fact that there was an accident
during shipping is out of our control! I've already
arranged for a new delive—

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But a delivery later is no use to students who
need the facilities today! Surely—

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Silence!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Calm down, Tazuna. Yes, the shipment has been
delayed, but we still have ample supplies in
reserve.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
The students will get nervous if they see you
acting like this. For their sakes, I suggest you take
a walk to cool down.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
M-my apologies... Yes, that... sounds like a good
idea.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tazuna trudges away, and I rush after her.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh... Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Did you happen to... witness that just now?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... How embarrassing. I lost my composure
back there.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I've seen all kinds of racers here at Tracen
Academy.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Of course, some do amazing in the Twinkle Series
and then go on to the Dream Trophy League,
but...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
There are only a few racers like that. Most aren't
so lucky.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Many lose the ability to perform at their best,
either due to injury or accident.
choice_data_list: So that's why you were so frantic.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Most of our students love running so much that
they've dedicated their lives to it by coming here.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
So the despair they feel when they find out they'll
never feel the wind in their faces again...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: It's absolutely dreadful...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, Tazuna falls silent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we stand there, we can hear students training
in the distance.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, I'm cooled off now!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Well then, I'd better get back to work. Sorry for
worrying you! I'll—

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Gyah!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry... I just tripped, that's all. How clumsy of
me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she puts on a smile, it's clear her ankle is
hurt.
choice_data_list: Let me take care of that!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Huh?! No, that's not necessary! Really!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her protests, I treat Tazuna's ankle with
the medical equipment I always have on me.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you... As expected, your first aid skills
are exemplary...
choice_data_list: I am a trainer, after all!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's true...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It feels very... reassuring having you around,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I might even be a little jealous of your trainee...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, that was a joke! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for taking care of me! If it's all right,
I'd like to repay the favor.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: So let's go out for a meal again. On me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Tazuna and I decide to go to our usual
ramen spot.
